description_long: This is a medium-to-large, muscular dog with a short, smooth coat that is predominantly fawn with black brindle striping and white markings on the chest, paws, and muzzle. The head is broad and square with a pronounced stop, a black mask, and a short, blunt muzzle. The ears are set high and are naturally floppy, hanging close to the sides of the head. The body is deep-chested and athletic, with a straight back and a slightly tucked abdomen. The legs are strong and straight, ending in compact, white-tipped paws. The tail is straight and carried low, blending seamlessly with the dog's powerful hindquarters.
description: A muscular, fawn brindle dog with a square head, black mask, white markings, floppy ears, and a straight, low tail. Its short coat and athletic build are characteristic of a Boxer.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, square head, black mask, white muzzle, and chest, with both floppy ears visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's athletic build, deep chest, fawn brindle coat, and straight, low tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dog's muscular hindquarters, straight back, and the tail carried low and straight.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the brindle pattern, white paws, and the dog's alert, upright posture.
